steps.t: Lothrandir will be waiting for you at Echad Dagoras, the next stop on the Grey Company's journey south into Fordirith, in northern Enedwaith. It is ti…
Lothrandir is at Echad Dagoras, the camp of the Grey Company in Fordirith, the northern reaches of Enedwaith. The Grey Company has passed into Enedwai…
Wadu of the Uch-lûth has come to Echad Dagoras in Fordirith. Lothrandir has asked you to speak with Wadu of the Uch-lûth.
